description: Malibu for men from playboy is inspired by the sun 'n sand of Malibu. Top notes are lemon, apple, mint, green leaves, lemon verbena and neroli with a heart of jasmine, iris, lemon, coriander and cedar, while the base considers musk, tonka, sandalwood and cashmere.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
